findings.issue: Hint and What-to-do point to internal/stat/netdev.go for the nicstat Mbps divisor ("как считается Mbps в netdev.go"). netdev.go only stores raw Rbytes/Tbytes (bytes/s) fields; the actual Mbps conversion (Rbytes/1024/128) is performed at print time in top/stat.go:741 (printNetdev), not in netdev.go. The tech-spec itself (Decision 5) correctly locates it in the print path.
findings.fix: Point the Mbps-divisor reference to top/stat.go printNetdev (line ~741, `s[i].Rbytes/1024/128 // conversion to Mbps`) rather than netdev.go. netdev.go remains a valid reference for the source byte fields.

findings.issue: Task 2 documents the collectStat() viewCh handler as ending in a single 'unconditional c.Reset() at top/stat.go:108', and instructs inserting the verbose continue-branch before it. The actual code has TWO Reset paths in the case v = <-viewCh block: a conditional Reset at line 101 (prevCollectExtra change) AND the unconditional Reset at line 108. The CollectExtra branch (95-103) does NOT `continue`, so it falls through to the line-108 Reset. The verbose early-out must be placed so a verbose-only toggle returns before reaching line 101 as well, otherwise a future combined change could double-reset. The instruction (insert before 108, mirror ShowExtra branch at 89-93 with a `continue`) is correct, but the 'single unconditional Reset' framing understates the surrounding structure.
findings.fix: Clarify that the verbose `if prevVerbose != v.Verbose { prevVerbose = v.Verbose; continue }` branch goes alongside the other early-out branches (refresh 83-86, ShowExtra 89-93) — i.e. BEFORE the CollectExtra Reset at line 101 and the unconditional Reset at line 108 — so a verbose-only push exits the case via continue and reaches neither Reset.

findings.issue: Line-number references in Task 2 are approximate/slightly off against current code. config_view.go: toggleIdleConns is at line 411 (task says 411-435 — OK); viewSwitchHandler is at 240 with the scrollOffset reset at line 243 (task says 240-245 / 243 — OK). top/extra.go showExtra mirror loop is at lines 70-75 (confirmed exact). view.View struct ShowExtra/CollectExtra at lines 26-27 (task says struct 'lines 10-31' — OK). config struct in top/config.go is lines 10-20 with scrollOffset at line 19 (confirmed). These are accurate; only the collectStat internal line citations (57/89-93/108) should be treated as guidance since edits will shift them.
findings.fix: No code change required; treat all cited line numbers as approximate anchors. The referenced symbols (showExtra mirror loop, ShowExtra branch, unconditional Reset, viewSwitchHandler scrollOffset reset, toggleIdleConns) all exist as described.
